name: axis_handshake_buffer
description: Ready/valid one-word skid or pipeline buffer for AXI-stream-like data paths.

source_refs.notes: Ready/valid AXI-stream register, including simple/skid style buffering.
Small ready/valid producer-consumer boundary in UART transmitter.

parameters.name: REG_TYPE
parameters.description: Implementation style: bypass, simple, or skid.

behavior: Input transfers occur only when s_axis_tvalid and s_axis_tready are high on the same rising clock edge.
Output transfers occur only when m_axis_tvalid and m_axis_tready are high on the same rising clock edge.
Buffered payload and valid state are held stable while output valid is high and output ready is low.
The buffer may bypass data when input and output handshakes occur in the same cycle.
constraints: Do not drop valid data under downstream backpressure.
Do not change m_axis_tdata while m_axis_tvalid is high and m_axis_tready is low.
Avoid combinational ready/valid loops across module boundaries unless explicitly designed as bypass logic.
Use skid storage when downstream ready can deassert after upstream has already observed ready.
patterns: A transfer occurs only when valid and ready are both high on the same clock edge.
Hold tdata stable while tvalid is high and tready is low.
Compute input ready from output ready or buffer vacancy.
Use skid storage when downstream ready can deassert late.
implementation_notes: Implement at least one data register and one valid register for the simple-buffer form.
Compute s_axis_tready from buffer vacancy or output acceptance.
For skid mode, add temporary storage so a late ready deassertion does not lose the accepted word.
Keep sideband signals, if any, registered with the same enable as tdata.
test_strategy: Randomize source valid and sink ready.
verification_goals: All accepted input payloads appear at the output exactly once and in order.
s_axis_tready deasserts when the buffer cannot accept another word.
Bypass cycles do not duplicate or skip payloads.
